rationale: The skill centers on Firebase Hosting deployment, which requires reading/writing firebase.json and .firebaserc config files plus a public build directory. It explicitly invokes `npx -y firebase-tools@latest`, which spawns npx/node and downloads packages from the npm registry. Deploy and emulate operations contact Google/Firebase APIs for auth, hosting uploads, and CDN releases, and the firebase CLI persists auth/cache state under the user's config directory.
